message:
feat(ufunc): add physicist's Hermite polynomial operations and Laguerre series

Add hermadd, hermsub, hermmul (via power basis roundtrip), hermdiv
(with zero-polynomial guard), hermroots (companion matrix for degree>=3),
hermcompanion, hermgauss (Gauss-Hermite quadrature), hermweight, and
hermfit (weighted least-squares). Add Laguerre series operations:
lagadd, lagsub, lagmul, lagdiv, lagroots, lagfit, lag2poly, poly2lag,
lagcompanion, laggauss, lagweight. All follow NumPy's polynomial
module API conventions. Includes comprehensive test suite.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
